title: Mash-Up Addon
description: An addon that adds all the Mash-Up worlds into Legacy4J! (DEPRECATED)
body: # Mash-Up Addon for Legacy4J [](https://modrinth.com/project/mash-up-addon) [](https://ko-fi.com/omoso) The Mash-Up Addon is an addon to the Legacy4J mod which implements all of the Mash-Up worlds into the mod. ![World Creation Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tGogOrip/images/bd37cdcdaefd1bb98568f14abf286104adbe807b.png) ## Notice This includes ***JUST*** the worlds! Not any of the texture packs! You may check out [Festive Mash-Up](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/festive) or the [Halloween Mash-Up](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/halloween-mash-up) by BrandonItaly, or the [Fallout Mash-Up](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fallout-mashup) by RedRain0o0 for some of the textures. ## FAQ - Will you be adding the resource packs from the mash-ups to the world files? Maybe in the future, but not now. The file size would be >500mb and I would rather have that job be for people with more experience than me. ## Credits - AudiShare997 for a lot of these worlds - RedRain0o0 for the Disc Hunt datapack
